itemLabel.value: Statistical Validity of Public A/B Tests

query: SELECT ?item ?itemLabel ?testMetric ?sampleSizeA ?sampleSizeB ?pValue ?effectSize ?url WHERE { VALUES ?item { wd:Q19873191 } OPTIONAL { ?item wdt:P31 ?type . } OPTIONAL { ?item wdt:P1476 ?testMetric . } OPTIONAL { ?item wdt:P21 ?sampleSizeA . } OPTIONAL { ?item wdt:P31 ?sampleSizeB . } OPTIONAL { ?item wdt:P2093 ?pValue . } OPTIONAL { ?item wdt:P402 ?url . } SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "[AUTO_LANGUAGE],en". } } LIMIT 100
